summary: Iteration 3 - UX overhaul (persistent CopilotPanel, ProgressTracker, StageNav, new Projects + Export pages, refactored visuals). Backend pytest still 25/25 PASS (chat scope='content' verified). Frontend: 90% of testids verified across landing, /research, /studio, /export, /projects. TWO frontend issues found - one CRITICAL: /ideation crashes with an Uncaught React error 'Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {competitor, where_we_win, where_they_win, dont_compete_on, sharpest_message})' which whites out the whole Strategy page. Root cause: StrategyIdeation.jsx line 42 falls back to the whole competitiveEdges[0] object when .against is missing. Second: Copilot chat send on /research did not produce a user/assistant bubble (only intro shown) - the message text remained in the input box after click; needs investigation (possibly RunContext not loaded yet when click fired, or send button click guarded by run not yet hydrated). Also content-group-seo is missing on /studio because the seeded run has no content.seo items - groups only render when items.length>0; spec implies all 4 channels should be visible.

minor.issue: Bad format/scope returns 422 (Pydantic Literal) instead of strict 400. Acceptable.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Navigating to /ideation with the seeded complete run crashes with 'Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {competitor, where_we_win, where_they_win, dont_compete_on, sharpest_message})'. The full Strategy page is replaced by the CRA red error overlay; copilot-title, exec-summary-strategy, positioning-canvas, swot-grid, messaging-pyramid and strategic-priorities never mount. Root cause: /app/frontend/src/pages/StrategyIdeation.jsx line 42 -> `unlike: (strategy.foundation.competitiveEdges || [])[0]?.against || (strategy.foundation.competitiveEdges || [])[0]` - when competitiveEdges[0] is an object that lacks `.against`, the fallback yields the WHOLE object. PositioningCanvas then renders `{b.value}` on Visuals.jsx line 275 which throws. Fix: coerce to string, e.g. `unlike: edge?.against || edge?.competitor || edge?.label || (typeof edge === 'string' ? edge : '')`. Same hardening should be applied to any other field that maps from competitiveEdges (line 52 already does typeof-string handling; line 42 does not).

After filling copilot-input-research and clicking copilot-send-research, no user bubble or assistant bubble appears - only the intro message remains and the input text stays unflushed. Repro: localStorage set move:active_run_id=7da57a83..., open /research, wait 4s, type into copilot-input-research, click copilot-send-research; expected 2+ messages, observed 1 (intro). Likely cause: RunContext run/runId not yet hydrated when click fires, so the `!runId` branch should have at least appended a placeholder - but messages count stayed at 1, suggesting the click handler may not be running (input change wasn't committed before click, or send button was technically disabled). Worth instrumenting - this is the SOLE primary interaction of the new persistent panel.

content-group-seo did NOT render on /studio for the seeded complete run because content.seo is empty (group only mounts when items.length>0, line 156). linkedin/blog/email render fine. Either seed the existing run with seo articles, or render an empty-state for missing channels so the testid is always present.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot exercise Previous/Next/Return-to-Projects/Progress click-through on /ideation because the page itself crashes on mount. Blocks any visual verification of SWOT, Positioning, Messaging, Priorities, exec-summary-strategy, and StageNav on that route.

Send did not append messages on /research with the seeded complete run. Backend /api/runs/{id}/chat for scopes research/strategy/content is verified working in pytest, so this is purely a frontend wiring/timing issue.

verified_passing: Hero CTA 'Start building GTM strategy' navigates to /research
TopNav nav-research, nav-strategy, nav-content, nav-export all visible
Persistent CopilotPanel visible by default on lg+ for /research, /studio, /export, /projects
copilot-title strings: 'Research Assistant' on /research, 'Content Assistant' on /studio, 'GTM Assistant' on /export and /projects (cannot verify /ideation due to crash)
copilot-collapse hides panel and shows copilot-fab; collapsed state persists in localStorage (move:copilot:collapsed='1') across reload
StageNav on /research: stage-nav-prev DISABLED, stage-nav-projects + stage-nav-next visible. stage-nav also visible on /studio and /export.
Research page: industry-snapshot, exec-summary-research, tab-landscape, tab-competitors (renders competitor-matrix), tab-personas (renders icp-cards)
Studio page: asset-cards present, content-group-linkedin, -blog, -email present
Export page: 'Download your GTM kit' hero, export-zip + 3 PDF + 3 DOCX + PPTX cards all present
Projects page: 7 project-card-{id} entries listed; clicking a card navigates to the run's correct stage (/export for the seeded complete run)
action_items: FIX (CRITICAL): /app/frontend/src/pages/StrategyIdeation.jsx line 42 - coerce `unlike` to a string. Suggested: `const edge0 = (strategy.foundation.competitiveEdges || [])[0]; unlike: typeof edge0 === 'string' ? edge0 : (edge0?.against || edge0?.competitor || edge0?.label || edge0?.sharpest_message || '')`. As a defensive hardening, also wrap PositioningCanvas `{b.value}` with `String(b.value ?? '')` so a future malformed payload cannot whitescreen the page.

FIX (HIGH): CopilotPanel send flow on /research. Verify that the send click actually executes when run state hasn't fully hydrated yet, or disable the send button until `ready` so the user gets a clear visual cue; also confirm RunContext finishes the GET /api/runs/{id} before enabling the panel.
FIX (MEDIUM): Always render a content-group-{linkedin,blog,seo,email} testid (with an empty state) so the testid contract is stable and the SEO group is not silently absent.
Optional: convert export-validation errors from 422 to 400 for strict spec compliance.
critical_code_review_comments: Defensive rendering: any visual that maps free-form LLM JSON (PositioningCanvas, MessagingPyramid, CompetitorMatrix, StrategicPriorities) should coerce leaf values via String(v ?? '') before placing them in JSX, since LLM payloads vary across runs.

ContentStudio uses .filter(g => g.items.length > 0) which hides empty channels - this conflicts with the new spec that says all 4 channel groups should be visible. Render the group with an empty-state row to keep testids stable.

CopilotPanel useEffect on stage change always RESETS messages - a user who is mid-conversation will lose history if they tab over to /studio and back. Consider keying conversation by stage and persisting in localStorage if 'never disappears' is a UX promise.

ProgressTracker computes completedStages from a prop that's not passed by any page in the codebase I inspected - the visual will likely never show check-marks. Worth wiring this to run.stage / run.status.

success_rate.frontend: ~75% - landing/research/studio/export/projects all pass testid checks; /ideation completely broken; Copilot chat send is non-functional from the UI

test_credentials: N/A - app has no user auth
seed_data_creation: Reused existing complete run 7da57a83-626e-47b2-9289-044d2e4fbd6c. Set localStorage.move:active_run_id to seed the active run for frontend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid (25/25). After main agent fixes the unlike-object crash in StrategyIdeation.jsx, retest the full /ideation page (exec-summary-strategy, positioning-canvas, swot-grid, messaging-pyramid, strategic-priorities, stage-nav). Also retest copilot chat send on any stage. Re-verify content-group-seo is visible (or that an empty-state is rendered). Tests: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers backend in <10s using the seeded run.
rca of the issue: PRIMARY: StrategyIdeation.jsx maps the strategy result onto a `positioning` view-model. Line 42 sets `unlike: competitiveEdges[0]?.against || competitiveEdges[0]`. For the seeded run, competitiveEdges[0] is an object {competitor, where_we_win, where_they_win, dont_compete_on, sharpest_message} that has NO `.against` field, so the OR fallback returns the whole object. PositioningCanvas then renders `{b.value}` directly (Visuals.jsx:275), and React throws 'Objects are not valid as a React child' which unmounts the entire route. Reproduction: open /ideation with localStorage move:active_run_id=7da57a83-626e-47b2-9289-044d2e4fbd6c. Mitigation: see fix in action_items.
